query:
-- Primeiro, vamos ver quais são as trades abertas
SELECT id, symbol, entry_price, quantity, recommendation, opened_at 
FROM trades 
WHERE status = 'OPEN' 
ORDER BY opened_at ASC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 48pPh9xYP94hzUq.root --database 7RQABHEP2Bfkm28njawraw --execute 
-- Primeiro, vamos ver quais são as trades abertas
